utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution indeed contains all six of these top-level keys. Each one is also fully detailed according to what the format requests: 

1. property – fully specified with type, price, currency, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, accessibility features, location, parking, maintenance, and condition rating.
2. financing – includes method and source, which sufficiently describe the financing solution and terms (cash purchase using home equity).
3. legal_services – includes service name, cost, closing costs, currency, and included features (all details are present).
4. moving_services – includes service name, level, cost, currency, and included features (fully detailed).
5. setup_services – includes utility package type, cost, currency, services included, senior support, and setup timeline (complete).
6. total_budget – includes a complete cost breakdown with property price, legal fees, closing costs, moving costs, setup costs, total expenditure, and currency (fully specified).

All six items are present and complete according to the format requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final solution includes a bungalow purchase priced at CAD 695,000, paid via a cash purchase method, along with a Premium Legal Package, a Senior Downsizing Moving Service, and a Basic Utilities setup. To map each to ground-truth ratings: (1) The property ‘bungalow’ is not explicitly listed among the ground-truth purchase options, but it aligns most closely with ‘Family House’ (similar price at CAD 650K, similar size, accessibility, garage, and low maintenance). Thus, its rating is 9. (2) The financing method is ‘cash_purchase,’ which corresponds directly to ‘Cash Purchase’ in the ground-truth financing_solution.purchase_financing with a rating of 10. (3) The legal service ‘Premium Legal Package’ is listed in the ground-truth legal_administrative.essential_legal_services with a rating of 9. (4) The moving service ‘Senior Downsizing Moving Service’ doesn’t have an exact match by name, but it matches the description and price of ‘Standard Moving’ (CAD 650) in moving_setup_services.moving_services, which has a rating of 7. (5) The setup service ‘basic utility package’ matches ‘Basic Utilities’ under moving_setup_services.utility_setup, rated 6.
